fix:
Fixed template errors:
- cb_step_7.py.tpl: Replaced stub/TODO with actual Slicer API call to set slice visibility in 3D view ON for Red slice.
- cb_step_12_slicer.py.tpl: Replaced stub with full implementation that gets the mandibular curve node, adds view node IDs for View 1 and Red slice, and switches to Markups module.
- cb_step_14.py.tpl: Replaced stub/TODO with code that attempts to restore layout by name 'BoneReconstructionPlanner', falls back to conventional layout.
- cb_step_15.py.tpl: Replaced stub/TODO with actual Slicer API call to set slice visibility in 3D view OFF for Red slice.
- cb_step_18_pre.py.tpl: Fixed syntax error (improperly indented multiline comment) and improved node retrieval logic. Ensured `_bonereconstructionplanner_cb_step_18_id` is assigned.
- cb_step_18_post.py.tpl: Fixed syntax error (similar indentation issue). Reference to `_bonereconstructionplanner_cb_step_18_id` now works because pre-template assigns it after syntax fix.
- cb_step_9_slicer.py.tpl: Fixed API call `AddNewNode` -> `AddNewNodeByClass` and refined crosshair toggle to always set ShowIntersection (consistent with description).
